Other Writing

## [Traditional Ecological Knowledge and Indigenous Religious Freedom](https://canopyforum.org/2025/10/25/traditional-ecological-knowledge-tek-and-indigenous-religious-freedom-the-case-of-chichil-bildagoteel/?utm_source=chatgpt.com), Canopy Forum, October 25, 2025

## [The Future of Anti-Discrimination](https://publicsquaremag.org/politics-law/legal/public-accommodation-laws-post-303-creative/), Public Square Magazine, July 14, 2023

## [What Religious Freedoms Do You Actually Have?](https://www.deseret.com/opinion/2021/7/19/22579124/what-religious-freedoms-fo-you-actually-have-supreme-court-smith-test-jonas-yoder/), Deseret News, July 19, 2021, with Anna Bryner and Daniel Frost

## [The Supreme Court Won’t Settle Religious Liberty Issues](https://www.newsweek.com/supreme-court-wont-settle-religious-liberty-issues-opinion-1602692), Newsweek, June 23, 2021, with Daniel Frost

## [The Quiet Beginnings of Religious Freedom in the Constitution](https://blog.consource.org/post/187358030795/the-quiet-beginnings-of-religious-freedom-in-the#disqus_thread), Constitutional Sources Project, August 30, 2019

## [How the losing side of the Constitutional Convention shows us the true strength of democracy](https://www.deseret.com/2019/7/10/8935949/guest-opinion-how-the-losing-side-of-the-constitutional-convention-shows-us-the-true-strength-of-dem/), Deseret News, July 19, 2019
